name: Apple Walnut Triangles
recipeIngredient: 2 Rome Beauty apples; peeled, finely chopped
1/2 cup Pine nuts -OR- walnuts; light toasted and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apples, nuts, lemon peel, sugar, and nutmeg in a medium bowl. Mix well to blend flavors and set aside.
2. Unroll the phyllo dough sheets. Cut the dough lengthwise into 2-inch wide strips. Place the strips on waxed paper over damp towels.
3. Cover all the dough strips except for two of them. Brush the two un-covered strips with melted butter.
4. Place about 2 teaspoons of the filling in the center of each strip, approximately 1 inch from the top edge.
5. Fold one corner of each strip over the filling. Fold over again like a flag until the entire strip is folded.
6. Place the folded pastries on a buttered baking pan measuring 10x15 inches, sides covered with melted butter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack. Sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar if desired.
